calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Stephen M. Spinella, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Equipment Finance, Inc.
No appearance by Defendants Globle Viva, Inc. and Anna Yu.

Defaults entered on defendants Globle Viva, Inc. and Anna Yu on 09/28/08.
Doe defendants dismissed on 09/28/08.
Order re: waiver of appearance of witness filed 10/30/07.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Globle Viva, Inc. and Anna Yu as follows:
Damages/Principal $90,033.76
Prejudgment Interest $5,374.16
Attorney's Fees $11,047.00
Costs $1,845.00, for a total of $108,299.92.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
